title: Dungeons Water
description: Adds the water texture and colors from Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

Dungeons Water adds the water from Minecraft Dungeons into the game. The textures are not completley desaturated to make the water more vibrant.

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)

Custom water colors are implemented using [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone). This is optional.
